info.description: Filtered OpenAPI description for the stateless synchronous Alibaba Cloud AI Generation proxy. The gateway serves only the allowlisted operations defined in the paired YAML manifest.
info.title: Alibaba Cloud AI Generation API

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples for GenerateCosplayImage under the Generate (aigen) category. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=GenerateCosplayImage and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

FaceImageUrl.description:
The URL of the input facial image. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or in OSS buckets outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~). Input constraints are as follows:  
- Image format: JPG, JPEG, PNG.  
- File size: No more than 4 MB.  
- Facial image resolution: Minimum 256×256 pixels, maximum 5760×3240 pixels, with an aspect ratio not exceeding 1:2.  
> If the image resolution exceeds the maximum limit, scale down the image first. For details, see [Image Scaling](~~44688~~).  
- The URL must not contain Chinese characters.

Style.description:
Generation style. Valid values:  
- 0: Realistic portrait (realportrait)  
- 1: 3D cartoon (3dcartoon)

TemplateImageUrl.description:
The URL of the input template image. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or in OSS buckets outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~). Input constraints are as follows:  
- Image format: JPG, JPEG, PNG.  
- File size: No more than 4 MB.  
- Template image resolution: Minimum 256×256 pixels, maximum 5760×3240 pixels, with an aspect ratio not exceeding 1:1.5. Images exceeding this ratio will be automatically clipped to fit 1:1.5.  
> If the image resolution exceeds the maximum limit, scale down the image first. For details, see [Image Scaling](~~44688~~).  
- The URL must not contain Chinese characters.

Data.description: The returned result data. This data can be obtained only after the asynchronous task has succeeded, by invoking the [GetAsyncJobResult](~~607824~~) API and performing JSON deserialization on its Result field.

ResultUrl.description:
The URL of the generated Cosplay-character image.  

> This URL is temporary and valid for 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL becomes inaccessible. To retain the file for a longer duration or permanently, you must access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then store it in your own OSS bucket or another storage space.

Message.description: The message returned after submitting an asynchronous task.
Message.example: 该调用为异步调用，任务已提交成功，请以requestId的值作为jobId参数调用同类目下GetAsyncJobResult接口查询任务执行状态和结果。

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and Sample of InteractiveFullSegmentation under the Generate (aigen) category. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=InteractiveFullSegmentation and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageUrl.description:
URL of the input image. It is recommended to use an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For images stored locally or via OSS links in other regions, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~). Input constraints are as follows:  
- Image formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG, BMP, WEBP.  
- File size: No larger than 10 MB.  
- Image dimensions: Minimum 32×32 pixels, maximum 4096×4096 pixels.  
- The URL must not contain Chinese characters.

ReturnFormat.description: Output image format. Supports JPG and PNG. Default value is PNG.

Data.description: The returned result data. This data becomes available only after the asynchronous task has succeeded. You must invoke the [GetAsyncJobResult](~~607824~~) API and perform JSON deserialization on its `Result` field to obtain this data.

ResultUrl.description:
The URL of the TXT file storing the result, which contains the following information:  
- output.region_index: The index image, with values ranging from 0 to 255.  
- output.region_info: A list of all segmentation results. In each segmentation result, the `region` value represents the corresponding segmented image, where valid segmented areas are visualized in white (pixel value 255) and other areas in black (pixel value 0). The `index` value corresponds to the index of that segmentation result.  

> This URL is temporary and has a validity period of 30 minutes. After expiration, the file will no longer be accessible. If you need to retain the file for an extended period or permanently, access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then save it to your own OSS bucket or other storage space.

Message.description: Message returned after submitting an asynchronous task.
Message.example: 该调用为异步调用，任务已提交成功，请以requestId的值作为jobId参数调用同类目下GetAsyncJobResult接口查询任务执行状态和结果。

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of InteractiveScribbleSegmentation under the aigen category in the Visual Intelligence API. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=InteractiveScribbleSegmentation and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

EdgeFeathering.description: Specifies whether to apply edge feathering. The default value is true.

ImageUrl.description:
The URL of the input image. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~). Input constraints are as follows:  
- Image formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG, BMP, WEBP.  
- File size: no more than 10 MB.  
- Image dimensions: at least 32×32 pixels and at most 4096×4096 pixels.  
- The URL must not contain Chinese characters.

IntegratedMaskUrl.description:
The integrated mask URL. This combines the initial mask, positive stroke records, and negative stroke records into the three channels (R, G, B) of a single RGB image, reducing the number of images transmitted and thereby saving upload and download time. The input constraints are as follows:
- Image format: JPG, JPEG, PNG, BMP, or WEBP.
- Image size: No larger than 5 MB.
- Input image resolution: Between 32×32 pixels and 4096×4096 pixels (inclusive) and must match the resolution of the source image.

MaskImageUrl.description:
The input mask URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. If your file is stored locally or on an OSS instance in a different region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~). The input constraints are as follows:
- Image format: JPG, JPEG, PNG, BMP, or WEBP.
- Image size: No larger than 5 MB.
- Input image resolution: At least 32×32 pixels and must match the resolution of the source image.

NegScribbleImageUrl.description:
The URL of the negative scribble trail image. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~). Input constraints are as follows:  
- Image formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG, BMP, WEBP.  
- File size: no more than 5 MB.  
- Image dimensions: at least 32×32 pixels and at most 4096×4096 pixels, and must match the resolution of the input original image.

PosScribbleImageUrl.description:
The URL of the positive scribble trail image. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~). Input constraints are as follows:  
- Image formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG, BMP, WEBP.  
- File size: no more than 5 MB.  
- Image dimensions: at least 32×32 pixels and at most 4096×4096 pixels, and must match the resolution of the input original image.

PostprocessOption.description:
Selects the mask refinement model. Valid values are as follows:  

- edgerefine: stable but slightly less fine-grained.  
- maskrefine (default): highly fine-grained but less stable.

ReturnForm.description:
The form of the output image. Valid values are as follows:  

- rgb_alpha (default): returns a four-channel PNG image with a transparent background.  
- only_alpha: returns a single-channel mask.  
- white_background: returns an image with a white background.

ReturnFormat.description: The output image format. JPG and PNG are supported. The default value is PNG.

Data.description: The content of the returned result data.

ResultUrl.description:
The URL of the output image, in the format specified by the request parameter.  
> This URL is temporary and has a validity period of 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL becomes inaccessible. If you need to retain the file for an extended period or permanently, access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then store it in your own OSS bucket or other storage space.
